---
title: "Bioinformatics"
---

{{< meta course.semester >}} · {{< meta course.institution >}}

Lecture ({{< meta course.sws-lecture >}} SWS) and practical
({{< meta course.sws-practical >}} SWS), BSc semester 5.

## Start here

- [Schedule](schedule.qmd) — what happens when
- [Lecture 01 — Sequence Alignment](lectures/01-alignment/index.qmd)
- [Practical 01 — Pairwise Alignment](practicals/01-alignment/index.qmd)

## Software

Everything you need is pinned in `pixi.toml`. Install
[pixi](https://pixi.sh), then run `pixi install` once.

::: {.callout-warning}
## Windows users

Work inside WSL2. Several bioconda tools have no native Windows build.
:::
